channel.title: Za Ndani
channel.description: Kenya and World News, Politics, Sports, and Entertainment

item.title: Kenya Railways seeks consultants for Ksh65 billion transport project
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: Kenya Railways has opened a bidding process for the World Bank funded KUMIP project to integrate rail and bus transit across five Nairobi counties.
item.content:encoded: Kenya Railways has opened a bidding process for the World Bank funded KUMIP project to integrate rail and bus transit across five Nairobi counties.
